brief_notes: Cortical correlations paper on L5 IT neurons. Key numbers verified: dosages 0.2-10 μg/g for clozapine etc., 25% dynamic range, 90% LED duty cycle, 30% ΔF/F exclusion, 10 out of 3801 sessions (0.26%), 182/148 region pairs, 114/84 pairs, 50% contour, family-wise α/m correction m=9. 5798 words, 6 sections. 0 figures in main.tex (not embedded).
